productDisplayName: Playboy Men Casual White Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the cool and casual thinkers, this shoe from playboy oozes confidence, style and comfort. Slip into these shoes and seize the day with much ease, while the stylish design enhances your fashion statement. Upper Synthetic leather upper with perforated side panels and fabric inner for enhanced breathability Synthetic leather overlays in contrast colour on the side panels, with branding on the lateral panel for style Padded tongue and collar for all-day comfort PU wrap-around foxing with textured rubber toe guard and toe box for enhnaced durability and protection to the forefoot Lace-ups through hexagonal eyelets for a stylish snug Fit Leather overlay at the back collar with brand logo for easy wearing of the shoe, durability and style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort Mildly padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Red TPR outsole in herringbone pattern for durability, grip and traction
